fancycaptcha-specialpage:
Shown on all special pages to anonymous users when:
# the [[mw:Extension:ConfirmEdit|ConfirmEdit extension]] is installed,
# the CAPTCHA type is FancyCaptcha (distorted words)
# the current user is subject to CAPTCHAs and
 # the user has NOT passed a CAPTCHA recently (recently means whatever the system administrators have specified, 30 minutes by default)
questycaptcha-specialpage:
Shown on all special pages to anonymous users when:
# the [[mw:Extension:ConfirmEdit|ConfirmEdit extension]] is installed,
# the CAPTCHA type is QuestyCaptcha (a randomly chosen question from a pre-configured set of questions and answers)
# the current user is subject to CAPTCHAs and
 # the user has NOT passed a CAPTCHA recently (recently means whatever the system administrators have specified, 30 minutes by default)
